india_trends.title: Sebi proposes cash settlement for select agri derivatives to revive volumes
india_trends.summary: Sebi's proposal marks a significant policy shift for India’s agricultural derivatives market, where compulsory physical settlement has long been mandatory to ensure alignment between futures and spot prices and curb excessive speculation.

india_trends.title: India revises GDP release calendar, annual and Q4 figures now due on June 7
india_trends.summary: India's National Statistics Office has revised the annual GDP data release schedule, moving it from the last working day of May to June 7 annually. This change, effective from FY26 data, aims to enhance the quality and robustness of national accounts. The first revised release will be on June 5, 202

india_trends.title: Quality standards key to manufacturing push; toy sector turned net exporter after QCOs: Consumer Affairs Secretary Nidhi
india_trends.summary: India is staking its manufacturing ambition on quality compliance over cost, with QCOs now covering 723 products and the toy sector cited as a conversion success.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Dixon Technologies Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 36% YoY as topline grows 2%; Rs 10/share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Dixon Technologies reported a 36% YoY drop in Q4 consolidated PAT to Rs 256 crore despite a 2% rise in revenue to Rs 10,511 crore. EBITDA improved 9%, while the board recommended a Rs 10 per share dividend. The stock fell over 6% after the earnings announcement.

india_trends.title: Bodo Moller Chemie opens warehouse facility in Bengaluru
india_trends.summary: Bodo Moller Chemie has launched a new aerospace warehouse in Bengaluru. This facility will supply advanced materials to aviation and industrial manufacturers. india_trends.title: Quote of the Day | John Rogers: "The ability to outperform in financial markets requires creativity, vision and the ability to see what others cannot.”
india_trends.summary: Veteran investor John Rogers emphasised that outperforming in financial markets demands creativity, vision, and the ability to perceive what others miss. Success hinges on independent thinking, connecting trends, and challenging narratives, rather than following the crowd.

india_trends.title: Tata Power Q4 Results: Profit slips 4% YoY to Rs 996 cr, revenue falls 13%
india_trends.summary: Tata Power Q4 Results: Tata Power reported a consolidated net profit of Rs 996 crore for Q4 FY26, a 4% year-on-year decline, while revenue fell 13%. The company achieved its highest-ever annual PAT of Rs 5,118 crore for FY26, driven by strong performance in its renewables, solar manufacturing, and t

india_trends.title: Canara Bank sees NIM floor at 2.5%, confident of absorbing ECL hit without fresh equity
india_trends.summary: Canara Bank anticipates a strong FY27. Margins are stable, and asset quality remains robust. The bank can manage upcoming provisioning needs without raising fresh capital. Deposit growth is expected to continue at a healthy pace. Operating profits are projected to grow substantially. Return on asset

india_trends.title: Dr Reddy's Laboratories Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 86% YoY to Rs 221 crore, revenue dips 12%; Rs 8 per share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories Q4 Results: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories reported a consolidated net profit at Rs 221 crore in the March-ended quarter versus Rs 1,587 crore in the year ago period, an 86% YoY fall.

india_trends.title: Tata Power Q4 Results 2026: Consolidated net profit rises 8% to ₹1415 crore, revenue falls 13%; dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Tata Power Company reported an 8.3% rise in net profit to ₹1,415.52 crore for Q4 2026, despite a 13% decline in revenue to ₹14,900.20 crore. A final dividend of ₹2.50 per share is proposed, pending approval at the AGM on July 7, 2026.
